_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, follow-up visit details, investigations, advise for daycare procedure
Discharge Summary of last admission for URSL Laser procedure

claim.label: Detailed clinical notes of the current visit

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Discharge Summary of last admission suggestive of follow-up procedure?

common_queries: Discharge Summary of last admission not suggestive of a follow-up procedure.
Clinical notes for pre-authorization are incomplete or missing required details (examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, follow-up visit, investigations, or daycare advice).
Earlier discharge summary of last URSL procedure not submitted at pre-authorization.
Post-procedure Imaging (X-Ray/USG) not submitted at claim stage.
Urine routine report not submitted at claim stage.

clinical_key_pointers: Colic pain radiating from back to front
Hematuria may be present or absent
May be associated with fever, nausea and vomiting
additional_information.referral_criteria: Warning signs for immediate referral: Anuria, Fever with chills and rigors, Suspected renal failure, Persistent haematuria
